analysis.premise: 6 repos state ledgers contain raw 92 byte-canonical .jsonl files; A19 federation operates on HXC-encoded streams (with `# schema:` headers); raw .jsonl has no `# schema:` headers therefore A19 substitution opportunity = 0 (INERT). HXC pre-encoding adds `# schema:` headers → unlocks A19 PASS 0.5 substitution.

analysis.raw_91_honest_c3: adversarial corpus +43.32pp does NOT auto-translate to production corpora. PASS 0.5 LOAD-BEARING is corpus-class-conditional: requires (a) HXC-encoded stream, (b) schema fingerprint diversity such that PASS 0 census normalization changes file_count > 1, (c) per-file declaration-order variability such that v1 literal-line-match misses substitutions. Production corpora rarely satisfy ALL THREE conditions simultaneously. Deployment gate must be CORPUS-CLASS-AWARE.

pre_encoding_cost_forecast.recommendation: DO NOT pre-encode uniformly. Apply ONLY to corpus classes where A19 PASS 0.5 demonstrated NET POSITIVE saving with round-trip byte-eq PASS. Currently zero production corpus classes meet both conditions; only adversarial synthetic class meets both. Production deploy GATE FIRES — pre-encoding deployment DEFERRED until corpus class is identified that satisfies (a) NET POSITIVE saving AND (b) round-trip byte-eq 100% PASS.

analysis.raw_91_c3: empirical LIVE FIRE measurement on 4 production corpus classes; each measurement = pre-encode → A19 build-dict → A19 encode-v2 → A19 decode-v2 → round-trip byte-eq check

measurements.root_cause: pre-encode adds 14.70pp HXC framing overhead (small-file class header > body); v2 encode-v2 emits per-file id-map footer adding +12-15% per file; round-trip fail mode = trailing whitespace canonicalization (HXC `# schema:s1<space>` becomes `# schema:s1` after A19 v2 decode) — F-A19-6b TRIPPED on production refinement class
measurements.raw_91_honest_c3: first production-class A19 PASS 0.5 LIVE FIRE on real anima refinement files contradicts adversarial corpus +43.32pp result; falsifier F-A19-6b (encode_v2/decode_v2 round-trip byte-eq) FIRES on 92.5% of files in this class

measurements.root_cause: only 4 schema fingerprints across 25 files; A19 federation candidate set tiny; v1 and v2 produce identical byte counts

Round-trip byte-eq 25/25 PASS confirms PASS 0.5 idempotency holds when schema diversity is low.
